items.summary: Fix frontend actor instantiation in useActor.ts so that after Internet Identity authentication succeeds, the ICP actor is always re-created using the authenticated identity object (not the anonymous identity). The actor instance must be invalidated and re-created whenever the identity transitions from anonymous to authenticated. All mutation calls in useQueries.ts must use this authenticated actor so the backend receives the correct caller principal.

Fix the backend isAdmin authorization logic in backend/main.mo so that update methods correctly accept the authenticated admin principal. Audit the isAdmin() / caller verification function: ensure the stored adminPrincipal Option value is properly unwrapped before comparison, that no code path falls through to an anonymous-principal false-positive rejection, and that every admin-only update method (updateAbout, updateFeatures, updateGameDetails, updateInstagram, updateDeveloperWebsite, updatePressEmail, updateBodyTextColor, enablePasswordProtection, disablePasswordProtection) uses this corrected check.
